history.headline: From-scratch offline eval harness; first run hit 15/15 (golden set too easy). Added 4 adversarial tickets, dropped to 16/19 (84.2%) — failures revealed the classifier latches onto keywords rather than primary ask.

Two-step legal-brief summarizer (extract → summary) traced with Langfuse v4 via AnthropicInstrumentor + @observe. Two scores per trace (compression_ratio + LLM-judge faithfulness). First run showed 2/3 traces with faithfulness=0.0; the trace UI revealed the model returned correct scores like '0.75' but max_tokens=10 truncated trailing prose, breaking float() parsing — bug was in the parser, not the model. Lesson: observability decides which component to debug.
